<a id="zanna-graphics2d-tilemap"></a>
### `Zanna.Graphics2D.Tilemap`

Provides tile-based map.

Create `Zanna.Graphics2D.Tilemap` values through its registered constructor and use the returned
object with the instance members below. Its public surface exposes properties such as `Width`,
`Height`, `TileWidth` and operations including `SetTileset`, `SetTile`, `GetTile`, `Fill`.
